videoJson.name: 1" Type C
videoJson.fact1: This format was capable  of "trick-play" functions  such as still frames,  shuttle, and slow motion  variable-speed playback
videoJson.fact2: In this format, the entire  composite video signal  is recorded and played  back as is, without  being split into  separate components
videoJson.fact3: Recording devices  were able to  capture single  frames, which  made them  popular in the  development of  early computer  animation
